ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot interacting with a potato, starting with arms at rest, then reaching down, picking up the potato, and returning to a neutral pose.  The sequence will use the robot's two-joint arms to create a natural-looking interaction. The absence of elbows will be compensated by focusing on the shoulder movements and wrist orientation to convey the action smoothly.  Each frame will represent a clear change in the arm's position, allowing for smooth transitions through interpolation.

frames.beat: arms hang straight down, ready to grab
arms bend slightly, reaching down for the potato
arms scoop up the potato, hands turned inward
arms lift the potato, bringing it closer
arms return to rest, potato held securely
